backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, combining blob storage and authorization mixins to manage gemstones, reviews, cart, booking requests, contact submissions, gallery, and user profiles with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the 'Happy Clients' statistic in Testimonials.tsx was updated from '10,000+' to '500,000+' with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all major frontend source files, describing their purpose, key UI elements, and notable changes.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'ASTROMANIA' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for all pages (Home, Services, Gallery, GemstoneShop, Testimonials, Contact, BookConsultation), wraps the app in ThemeProvider and React Query, and renders a shared Header/Footer layout.
Reusable React component that renders HTML/CSS certificate cards matching Vastu Shikhar originals for 'astrology' or 'vastu' types, with decorative corner triangles, gold borders, watermark, and recipient/issuer details.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: FAQ section component rendering five accordion items covering Kundali accuracy, Vastu corrections, gemstone selection, gemstone effectiveness, and online consultations, styled with the cosmic dark theme.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, service links, and contact details including a Google Maps URL.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button with loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, gemstones, reviews, and cart items, wrapping actor calls with useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a deep cosmic dark theme with CSS custom properties, Tailwind imports, typography setup, dark form styles, and keyframe animations for cosmic effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Empty About page component file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: A consultation booking page with a form for selecting consultation type, mode, and personal details, which submits to the backend via a mutation hook and shows a success confirmation screen.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: A contact page with a message submission form, office/social media info, and an admin-only media gallery with upload and delete functionality backed by the ICP actor.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: A filterable media gallery page combining static photos and certificates with backend-uploaded images/videos, featuring a lightbox viewer and admin upload/delete controls.
frontend/src/pages/GemstoneShop.tsx: A gemstone shop page listing Vedic gemstones with details, benefits, and weight options, allowing users to view items and initiate WhatsApp-based purchase inquiries.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The landing page showcasing the astrologer's services, stats, and testimonials with a hero section, service cards, and links to booking and other pages.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: React page displaying a list of astrology/Vastu services with details like descriptions, includes, duration, and booking modes. Uses Internet Identity, React Query, and actor hooks for backend interactions including file uploads.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: React page rendering a grid of client testimonials with star ratings, and a statistics section that currently shows '10,000+' happy clients (needs updating to '500,000+').
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, store, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond), a cosmic color palette, custom shadows, background gradients, and keyframe animations for the project.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the known issue of the Testimonials page displaying '10,000+' instead of '500,000+' for the happy clients statistic, with a fix request feature entry.
